speaker: charlie
text: G'day, I'm Alex Mercer and you've tuned into ParkSyde Bright Side where we focus on the good stuff happening in our world. It's Friday the 24th of April, and we've got some brilliant news to share with you today.

speaker: alice
text: And I'm Jamie, and honestly Alex, today's bulletin is packed with stories that'll make you smile. We're talking about species bouncing back, grassroots heroes changing the world, and some pretty cool science breakthroughs.

speaker: charlie
text: Too right Jamie. Plus we've got Sam with the weather - and spoiler alert, it's looking pretty decent for the weekend here in sunny Queensland. Let's dive into the good stuff, shall we?
